data.evacuation_orders: "Go" evacuations are in effect for areas in red (represented by the zone numbers 1, 8, & 9 on the Watch Duty map)
data.evacuation_warnings: "Set" evacuations are in effect for areas in yellow (represented by the zone numbers 4 & 7 on the Watch Duty map)
data.evacuation_advisories: "Ready" evacuations are in effect for areas in green (represented by the zone numbers 6 & 10 on the Watch Duty map)

data.information:
An evacuation shelter is open at Andrews Hall on the Chadron State College campus.

The shelter is providing:

  • Two meals per day

  • Water and snacks

  • A safe place to stay and access support services

Update from South Fork Fire Nebraska page on Facebook.

This shelter is being operated by Chadron State College with support from the American Red Cross per the Nebraska Red Cross-Nebraska Iowa Region.
